components.name: Primary Export Button
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { min-height: 44px; padding: 12px 16px; border: 0; border-radius: 6px; background: hsl(38 30% 50%); color: hsl(0 0% 4%); font: 500 14px/1.4 Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,0.08); transition: background 150ms, box-shadow 150ms; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: hsl(38 30% 56%); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid hsl(38 30% 50%); outline-offset: 2px; box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px hsl(38 30% 70% / .7); } .ds-btn-primary:active { background: hsl(38 30% 47%); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { background: hsl(0 0% 14%); color: hsl(0 0% 55%); }

components.name: YouTube URL Field
components.description: Accepts a YouTube video or channel URL.
components.css: .ds-url-field { width: 100%; min-height: 48px; padding: 12px 16px; border: 0; border-radius: 6px; background: hsl(0 0% 4%); color: hsl(0 0% 98%); font: 400 14px/1.5 Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.06); transition: background 150ms, box-shadow 150ms; } .ds-url-field:hover { background: hsl(0 0% 6%); } .ds-url-field:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid hsl(38 30% 50%); outline-offset: 2px; box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px hsl(38 30% 50% / .5); }

components.name: Work Status Row
components.description: Shows one factual queue or file outcome.
components.css: .ds-status-row { display: flex; gap: 12px; align-items: flex-start; padding: 16px; border-radius: 6px; background: hsl(0 0% 9%); color: hsl(0 0% 98%); box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.06); font: 400 14px/1.5 Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-status-mark { width: 8px; height: 8px; margin-top: 6px; border-radius: 999px; background: hsl(38 30% 50%); } .ds-status-row strong, .ds-status-row small { display: block; } .ds-status-row small { margin-top: 2px; color: hsl(0 0% 55%); font: 400 12px/1.5 "Geist Mono", ui-monospace, monospace; }

narrative.overview: The interface is one quiet work surface for a serious repeated task. It should feel like placing a source on a desk, starting a dependable process, and returning to an organized folder. This is a warm-dark local utility, not a trading terminal or an AI assistant.
keyCharacteristics: One primary action and one clearly labeled input.
Restrained amber reserved for action, focus, and active progress.
File destinations and saved outcomes are always explicit.
Tonal surfaces and inset edges create structure without visible borders.
Compact, readable status language replaces implementation logs.

rules.name: The One Active Voice Rule
rules.body: Amber appears on less than ten percent of a screen and only communicates action or state.

rules.name: The No Market Signal Rule
rules.body: Red and green never decorate the interface; they appear only in clearly labeled error and success states.

rules.name: The One Read Rule
rules.body: The user should understand the current state without rereading a paragraph.

rules.name: The Flat Desk Rule
rules.body: Resting content stays flat. Elevation appears only when a surface temporarily sits above the workflow.

dos: Do keep the URL field, output destination, and primary action in the first viewport.
Do organize every automatic export under Desktop/Youtube_Transcript/<Channel Name>/.
Do write progress in plain language with counts and recovery instructions.
donts: Don't build a trading terminal filled with flashing prices, red/green noise, charts, or urgency cues.
Don't ship a generic AI dashboard with oversized gradients, feature-card grids, or assistant-like marketing copy.
Don't make stored database records more prominent than the exported files.
Don't expose setup-heavy provider, model, or pipeline choices during the normal workflow.
